hooks.command: LOOM_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && PROJECT=$(basename "$LOOM_DIR") && STATUS=$(python3 "$LOOM_DIR/scripts/loom" -p "$PROJECT" status --json 2>/dev/null) && DOCTOR=$(python3 "$LOOM_DIR/scripts/loom" -p "$PROJECT" doctor --json 2>/dev/null) && DRIFT=$(echo "$STATUS" | jq -r '.drift_count // 0') && HEALTHY=$(echo "$DOCTOR" | jq -r '.healthy // false') && if [ "$DRIFT" != "0" ] || [ "$HEALTHY" != "true" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Loom status: $DRIFT drifted implementation(s). Store healthy: $HEALTHY. Run loom status or loom doctor for details.\"}}"; fi

LOOM_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && PROJECT=$(basename "$LOOM_DIR") && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; RESULT=$(python3 "$LOOM_DIR/scripts/loom" -p "$PROJECT" check "$f" --json 2>/dev/null) || true; DRIFT=$(echo "$RESULT" | jq -r '.drift_detected // false' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$DRIFT" = "true" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Loom drift detected in $f. Requirements linked to this file have been superseded. Run: loom trace $f --json\"}}"; fi; }

LOOM_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && PROJECT=$(basename "$LOOM_DIR") && CHANGED=$(git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^docs/' | head -1) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then python3 "$LOOM_DIR/scripts/loom" -p "$PROJECT" sync --output "$LOOM_DIR/docs" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Loom: REQUIREMENTS.md and TEST_SPEC.md regenerated in docs/\"}}"; fi
